-class MultiTaskWrapper(gym.ObservationWrapper):

+class PaddedObsFeaturesExtractor(BaseFeaturesExtractor):

+    def __init__(self, observation_space, features_dim=256):

+        super().__init__(observation_space, features_dim)

+        

+        # Input dim includes original obs + task_id one-hot + padding indicator

+        input_dim = MAX_OBS_DIM + NUM_TASKS + 1  # +1 for padding indicator

+        

+        self.features_extractor = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Linear(input_dim, 512),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Linear(512, 256),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Linear(256, features_dim),

+            nn.ReLU()

+        )

+        

+        self._features_dim = features_dim

+

+    def forward(self, observations):

+        # observations shape: (batch_size, original_obs_dim)

+        batch_size = observations.size(0)

+        

+        # Extract original obs dim from the first sample

+        orig_obs_dim = observations.size(1)

+        

+        # Create padded observations

+        padded_obs = torch.zeros(batch_size, MAX_OBS_DIM, dtype=observations.dtype, device=observations.device)

+        padded_obs[:, :orig_obs_dim] = observations

+        

+        # Create task ID one-hot encodings (we'll fill this in the wrapper)

+        task_onehot = torch.zeros(batch_size, NUM_TASKS, dtype=observations.dtype, device=observations.device)

+        

+        # Create padding indicator (1 where padding was added, 0 otherwise)

+        padding_indicator = torch.zeros(batch_size, 1, dtype=observations.dtype, device=observations.device)

+        if orig_obs_dim < MAX_OBS_DIM:

+            padding_indicator = torch.ones(batch_size, 1, dtype=observations.dtype, device=observations.device)

+        

+        # Concatenate all features

+        combined_features = torch.cat([padded_obs, task_onehot, padding_indicator], dim=1)

+        

+        return self.features_extractor(combined_features)

+

+

+    def reset(self, seed=None, options=None):

+        obs, info = self.env.reset(seed=seed, options=options)

+        # Pad observation to MAX_OBS_DIM

+        padded_obs = np.zeros(MAX_OBS_DIM, dtype=np.float64)

+        padded_obs[:len(obs)] = obs

+        return padded_obs, info

+

+    def step(self, action):

+        obs, reward, terminated, truncated, info = self.env.step(action)

+        # Pad observation to MAX_OBS_DIM

+        padded_obs = np.zeros(MAX_OBS_DIM, dtype=np.float64)

+        padded_obs[:len(obs)] = obs

+        return padded_obs, reward, terminated, truncated, info
